name: start
_note: tournaments.start closes registration/check-in, auto-forfeits any entrant who never checked in (only if the check-in window was opened), generates the bracket for the format, and flips status to in_progress. Unknown id → 'tournament_not_found'; wrong status → 'wrong_status'; fewer than 2 eligible entrants → 'need_2_checked_in_entrants'. Returns forfeited (count of no-shows dropped). No money moves.
